title: Key material non-Debug invariant for HPKE secrets
description:
GOOD CHOICE: HPKE identity secret and room secret are stored as [u8; 32] arrays without Debug implementation (app.rs 109-115). The struct fields are marked with inline comments: 'KEY MATERIAL — never log, never debug-print'.

AppState itself does not derive Debug, making accidental debug output of these fields impossible. A contributor might add #[derive(Debug)] to AppState or move secrets into a Debug-implementing wrapper.

This is a paranoid defensive pattern that prevents key material leakage via tracing::debug!("{:?}", state). The design choice (not implementing Debug at all) is more effective than relying on code review to avoid certain function calls.
close_reason: DESIGN.md §1 Key material handling extended to document AppState/Inner/MerchantWallet non-Debug invariant; existing invariant confirmed: AppState derives Clone only, no Debug
